message:
refactor(test-infra): Idiomatic Rust cleanups in DockerFixtureService and test_logging

- DockerFixtureService::run_docker_cmd: remove unused &self, call as
  Self::run_docker_cmd (static method—does not reference instance state)
- is_healthy: replace if-let/else with map_or_else for clippy preference
- TempDirFixture::path: closure |d| d.path() → tempfile::TempDir::path
- TempDirFixture::is_healthy: map_or(false, ...) → is_some_and(...)
- InProcessService: extract type aliases for complex closure types
  (InProcessResult, InProcessStartFn, InProcessStopFn, InProcessHealthFn)
  to reduce line noise in struct definition and constructor
- Debug impl: finish() → finish_non_exhaustive() to signal closure fields
- Hoist std::sync::atomic imports to module level, remove per-test duplicates
- Format strings: "expected {:?}" → "expected {x:?}" inline captures
- sort() → sort_unstable() where stability is irrelevant (port uniqueness)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
